case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION VS BAZILE LEE P

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $902.65 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT BAZILE LEE P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAZILE LEE P

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAZILE LEE P $902.65 PRINCIPAL, $16.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $918.65, UNTIL AUG.1ST PAYMENTS ARE THEN TO INCREASE TO $50 PER MONTH UNTIL PAID INFULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
